description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script to update the package index and install Python 3 and pip with apt-get. Define a single job named test (in the default test stage) that executes the commands python3 -m pip install pytest and python3 -m pytest tests/unittests.py. The pipeline does not specify a Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or any conditional rules, so it runs on the default runner for every commit.
